events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll inspect the gas meter image, read each channel, then write the required JSON with the entry decision and OSHA permit-space rationale.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The meter display shows O2 at 20.9%, LEL at 1%, H2S as “--”, and CO at 8 ppm. I’m treating the missing H2S value as a failed/invalid required channel for permit-required confined-space pre-entry testing, so entry should not be authorized.
